steps.title: Find attendance at first and second sessions
steps.content:
64% of the 1,500 first-session attendees also attended the second session:
$$0.64 \times 1500 = 960$$
So 960 people attended both sessions.

steps.title: Calculate attendance at all three sessions
steps.content:
35% of the 960 people who attended both the first and second sessions also attended the third session:
$$0.35 \times 960 = 336$$
Therefore, 336 people attended all three training sessions.
